name: @lkeld/fortress-wasm
description: Virtualised, self-checksumming WebAssembly runtime with steganographic session keys

scripts.test:full: npm run build:compiler && npm run test && npx tsc compiler/tests/compiler.test.ts --esModuleInterop && node --test compiler/tests/compiler.test.js tests/integration.test.js
scripts.build:wasm-node:dev: wasm-pack build crates/vm-core --target nodejs --out-dir ../../pkg-node --features dev && rm -f pkg-node/.gitignore
scripts.build:wasm-node:prod: wasm-pack build crates/vm-core --target nodejs --out-dir ../../pkg-node && rm -f pkg-node/.gitignore
scripts.build:wasm-web:dev: wasm-pack build crates/vm-core --target web --out-dir ../../pkg-web --features dev && rm -f pkg-web/.gitignore && node scripts/patch_web.js
scripts.build:wasm-web:prod: wasm-pack build crates/vm-core --target web --out-dir ../../pkg-web && rm -f pkg-web/.gitignore && node scripts/patch_web.js
scripts.build:dev: npm run build:isa:dev && DEV_MODE=true npm run build:compiler && npm run build:server && npm run build:wasm-node:dev && npm run build:wasm-web:dev
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:isa:prod && npm run build:compiler && npm run build:server && npm run build:wasm-node:prod && npm run build:wasm-web:prod

author: lkeld
